de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.actions

Class CounterExampleAction.NoMainWindowCounterExampleGenerator

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.smt.counterexample.AbstractCounterExampleGenerator
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.smt.counterexample.AbstractSideProofCounterExampleGenerator
        • de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.actions.CounterExampleAction.NoMainWindowCounterExampleGenerator
  • Enclosing class:
    CounterExampleAction

    public static class CounterExampleAction.NoMainWindowCounterExampleGenerator
extends AbstractSideProofCounterExampleGenerator
    Performs the SemanticsBlastingMacro in a side proof hidden to the user and shows the result with help of the SolverListener.

      • createSolverListener

        protected SolverLauncherListener createSolverListener(SMTSettings settings,

        Creates the SolverLauncherListener which handles the results of the launched SMT solver.
        Specified by:
        createSolverListener in class AbstractCounterExampleGenerator
        Parameters:
        settings - The SMTSettings.
        proof - The Proof on which the SMT solver will be performed.
        Returns:
        The SolverLauncherListener to use.
